Bitcoin Slides as U.S. Inflation Exceeds Estimates at 8.3%
articles.description: Bitcoin and Ethereum were hit hard as the inflation data dropped. U.S. inflation has decreased for a second consecutive month.The Bureau of Labor Statistics published the latest Consumer Price Index report Tuesday, showing that the price of goods rose by 8.3% on a yearly basis in August.The 8.3% figure exceeded economists expectations of a cool-off to 8.1%. It marks a 20 basis point decline against Julys numbers.The CPI rose 0.1% on a month-on-month basis. According to the report, rising shel...
